---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for pytest-triage
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of the problem. Ex. "When triaging a failure I
can't ..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context here. Note that test generation and LLM-evaluation are
out of scope for this project (see the README).
